regulation_name: Act on Fair Labeling and Advertising
citation: Act on Fair Labeling and Advertising — Article 7
summary: False or exaggerated labeling and advertising that deceives consumers is prohibited.
review_guidance: TRIGGER: False product description, deceptive offer, or misrepresented benefit. ACTION: REJECT — correct misleading representation. CHECK: Material terms, specs, and offer conditions. ESCALATE IF: Repeat violation or KFTC investigation risk.
